selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the strongest verification-side active-system packet after the semantic reductions and the right source for one bounded audit-fence pass.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active-lineage audit into a smaller verification packet that preserves completeness, schema heterogeneity, contradiction continuity, and tiered reuse limits without turning the audit into new authority.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next bridge packet once the audit-side schema and reuse fences are preserved.
Strongest later reader-contract packet after the bridge layer.
Strongest later validator fixture packet once bridge and reader-contract layers are narrowed.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent audit already operates on the completed active manifest chain and reduction-support surfaces only, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the reuse limits that the audit must restate.

candidate_items.name: ACTIVE_CHAIN_COMPLETENESS_AUDIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest bounded verification result from the parent audit.

candidate_items.name: REDUCTION_LINEAGE_IS_CLEAR_EVEN_WHEN_LINK_STYLE_DRIFTS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the chain path legible without suppressing parent-link drift.

candidate_items.name: MANIFEST_SCHEMA_HETEROGENEITY_IS_REAL_NOT_NOISE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent audit's sharpest schema-side fence.

candidate_items.name: CONTRADICTION_CORRIDORS_SURVIVE_THE_FULL_CHAIN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Confirms that the chain preserves the same core contradiction corridors instead of resolving them.

candidate_items.name: TIERED_REUSE_REQUIRES_REOPEN_PARENT_DISCIPLINE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the most operationally useful reuse fence from the audit.

candidate_items.name: AUDIT_LAYER_VERIFIES_BUT_DOES_NOT_CLOSE_THE_CHAIN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the audit useful without inflating it into a closure or authority layer.

quarantined_items.name: VERIFICATION_LAYER_AS_SCHEMA_NORMALIZATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves manifest heterogeneity as a real lineage fact rather than cleanup residue.

quarantined_items.name: AUDIT_SUCCESS_AS_AUTHORITY_OR_MUTATION_PERMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly treats reuse as tiered and escalation-based rather than self-authorizing.

notes: This batch preserves the audit as a verification-side fence packet rather than a new authority layer.
